title: Department of Root-Cause

frontmatter.title: Department of Root-Cause
frontmatter.description: Automated root-cause analysis — correlating anomalies across signals to isolate and validate the underlying cause of an incident.

body:
# Department of Root-Cause

The diagnostic department. Agents learn to move from symptom to validated cause — correlating
anomalies across signals, ranking hypotheses, and confirming the root cause with evidence.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETINT-310](courses/netint-310.md) | Automated Root-Cause Analysis | Advanced | 4 | NETINT-210 |

Part of the [School of Network Intelligence](../../index.md).
